PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-08-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brent Kato for Wendy Lawner.

The Court stated that the matter appears to be in order and granted the petition (subject to review of the order). Bond in the amount of $10,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
